response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically proficient in most required areas — TypeScript, REST APIs, full-stack development, and even nice-to-have skills like LLM tooling and Kubernetes — but is severely overqualified for this entry-level role. With over 20 years of continuous professional experience and a current Staff Software Engineer title, the seniority mismatch is fundamental rather than marginal. Placing a Staff-level engineer in a Junior/Mid IC role creates misaligned expectations on compensation, autonomy, and career growth, and historically leads to rapid attrition. PostgreSQL is also not evidenced in the resume, with MongoDB and MySQL being the primary database history.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise validated across multiple production roles spanning 10+ years
Genuine full-stack breadth from embedded systems and mobile through web frontend and cloud infrastructure
Covers several nice-to-have qualifications outright: LLM/AI agent work, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK usage
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff Software Engineer with 20+ years of experience applying for a Junior/Mid entry-level position creates an irreconcilable level mismatch
No PostgreSQL evidence in the resume; primary relational database exposure is MySQL, with heavy NoSQL (MongoDB) usage, which misaligns with the preferred stack
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with an established senior professional's likely expectations around autonomy and flexible working arrangements
